findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax `:ref:`entityUnitTest`` is left verbatim in the markdown content of the knowledge file. This RST-specific markup should be removed or replaced with plain text in a knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST syntax: `詳細については、 :ref:`entityUnitTest` を参照。` — knowledge file carries this over literally as `詳細は :ref:`entityUnitTest` を参照。`
